---
link-bibliography: true
bibliography: publications.bib
csl: csl/publications.csl
nocite: |
  @jutrasdube2025osds
  @punyamoorty2025dynamic
  @jutrasdube2025singlestep
  @mesana2025measuring
  @jutrasdube2024copula
  @jutrasdube2024adaptive
  @mesana2024evaluating
---

::: {.hero-shell}
<div class="hero-name" role="heading" aria-level="1">Pascal Jutras-Dubé</div>

::: {.hero-intro}
::: {.hero-intro__media}
<img src="assets/headshot.jpg" alt="Headshot of Pascal Jutras-Dubé" class="hero-shot">
:::

::: {.hero-intro__content}
::: {.cardish}
PhD student (Computer Science) at Purdue University, advised by [Ruqi Zhang](https://ruqizhang.github.io){target="_blank" rel="noopener"}.
I've worked in efficient generative modelling and am now interested in diffusion LLMs.

**Seeking internships:** Summer 2026, Fall 2026, or Spring 2027.
:::
:::
:::
:::

<br>

## Publications 
::: {#refs}
:::
